name: vsrxvc
description: VSRXVC (Visual Studio Roblox Vibe Coding) - Run Roblox Lua scripts seamlessly from Visual Studio Code.

languageModelTools.name: vsrx_execute
languageModelTools.displayName: VSRXVC: Execute Lua Script in Roblox
languageModelTools.modelDescription: Executes a Lua script in the currently connected Roblox client via VSRX. Use this when the user wants to run Lua code in Roblox. Returns how many clients received the script.

script.description: The Lua script code to execute in Roblox.

vsrx.showNotifications.description: [UI] Show info notifications when executing or saving scripts.

vsrx.showSaveButton.description: [UI] Show the 'Save' shortcut on the Status Bar.

vsrx.showHubButton.description: [UI] Show the 'Hub' shortcut on the Status Bar.

vsrx.enableConsoleCapture.description: [Console] Completely Enable/Disable live Roblox log capture. Use this to reduce network usage or lag.

vsrx.enableInternalUI.description: [Roblox] Enable the Iris-based (ImGui) internal UI menu for management inside Roblox.

vsrx.showUIOnLoad.description: [Roblox] Automatically show the internal UI when the loader script runs (instead of waiting for F1).

vsrx.defaultSavePath.description: [Scripts] The default directory where your VSRX scripts are saved. Used for both saving and the In-Game browser.

enumDescriptions: Always show the VSRX status bar panel.
Show the VSRX status bar panel only when a Lua or Luau file is active.
vsrx.statusBarVisibility.description: [UI] When to show the VSRX status bar panel.

vsrx.noClientGuideAutoShow.description: [Inject UI] Automatically show the Inject setup guide when no Roblox clients are connected.

vsrx.noClientGuideAutoCopyOnOpen.description: [Inject UI] Automatically copy the loader script when the Inject setup guide opens (auto or manual).

vsrx.noClientGuideRepeatSeconds.description: [Inject UI] Delay in seconds before auto-showing the no-client guide again after it was closed. Set 0 for immediate reopen behavior while no clients are connected.

scripts.vscode:prepublish: npm run compile && npm run obfuscate
scripts.obfuscate: javascript-obfuscator out/extension.js --output out/extension.js --compact true --control-flow-flattening true --control-flow-flattening-threshold 0.75 --dead-code-injection true --dead-code-injection-threshold 0.4 --identifier-names-generator hexadecimal --rename-globals false --self-defending true --string-array true --string-array-encoding rc4 --string-array-threshold 0.75 --unicode-escape-sequence false --source-map false && javascript-obfuscator out/server.js --output out/server.js --compact true --control-flow-flattening true --control-flow-flattening-threshold 0.75 --dead-code-injection true --dead-code-injection-threshold 0.4 --identifier-names-generator hexadecimal --rename-globals false --self-defending true --string-array true --string-array-encoding rc4 --string-array-threshold 0.75 --unicode-escape-sequence false --source-map false
